datacenter.title: Microsoft Announces $10B Data Center Campus in Wisconsin
datacenter.snippet: Microsoft will invest $10 billion to build a massive hyperscale data center campus in Mount Pleasant, Wisconsin, to power AI workloads.

datacenter.title: Amazon Web Services Breaks Ground on 500MW Virginia Facility
datacenter.snippet: AWS has begun construction on a new 500-megawatt data center facility in Northern Virginia, expanding its presence in the largest data center market.

datacenter.title: Google Plans $3B Investment in Ohio Data Center Expansion
datacenter.snippet: Google has announced plans to invest $3 billion in expanding its data center operations across multiple Ohio campuses to support growing cloud demand.

datacenter.title: Texas Grid Operator Raises Concerns Over Data Center Power Demand
datacenter.snippet: ERCOT has flagged growing electricity demand from data centers as a potential strain on the Texas power grid, calling for updated infrastructure planning.

datacenter.title: Equinix Receives Approval for New Chicago Data Center
datacenter.snippet: Equinix has received zoning approval to build a new 60MW data center in the Chicago metropolitan area, targeting enterprise and cloud customers.

datacenter.title: Nuclear Power Seen as Key to Sustaining Data Center Growth
datacenter.snippet: Industry leaders are increasingly looking to nuclear energy, including small modular reactors, as a sustainable power source for next-generation data centers.

coreweave.title: CoreWeave Secures $7.5B in Debt Financing for GPU Cloud Expansion
coreweave.snippet: CoreWeave has raised $7.5 billion in debt financing to expand its GPU cloud infrastructure, marking one of the largest funding rounds for an AI infrastructure company.

coreweave.title: CoreWeave Opens New Data Center in New Jersey
coreweave.snippet: CoreWeave has opened a new data center facility in Weehawken, New Jersey, adding thousands of NVIDIA GPUs to its cloud infrastructure platform.

coreweave.title: CoreWeave Partners with NVIDIA on Next-Gen AI Infrastructure
coreweave.snippet: CoreWeave has announced an expanded partnership with NVIDIA to deploy next-generation GPU clusters optimized for large language model training.

coreweave.title: CoreWeave IPO Timeline Reportedly Pushed to Late 2025
coreweave.snippet: Sources close to the company suggest CoreWeave's planned IPO may be pushed to late 2025 as the company focuses on scaling infrastructure.
